content.fact_text: Implementation of a robust, production-ready Kafka messaging client using kafkajs, Opossum circuit breakers, and Zod for configuration validation.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides a production-ready Kafka messaging client with integrated Opossum circuit breaking for production resilience, including DLQ support for failed message processing.
interfaces: class KafkaMessagingClient: constructor(config: KafkaClientConfig, logger: Logger)
async publish(topic: string, key: string, message: any, headers?: Record<string, any>): Promise<void>
async createConsumer(groupId: string, topic: string, handler: (payload: EachMessagePayload) => Promise<void>, dlqTopic?: string): Promise<void>
provenance_data.utility: Provides a production-grade, fault-tolerant interface for Kafka event-driven messaging, ensuring reliability via circuit breakers and observability through Pino logging.
